scenario.name: Valid Login Test
scenario.description: Test successful login with correct credentials
steps: Verify successful login (check for dashboard/profile page)
scenario.expected_result: User should be logged in successfully

valid_login.generated_code:
def run_test(page, config):
    # Navigate to the login page
    page.goto(config['login_url'])
    
    # Wait for the email input to be visible
    page.wait_for_selector("input[type='email']", timeout=config.get('timeout', 30000))
    
    # Enter valid email address
    page.fill("input[type='email']", config['email'])
    
    # Wait for the password input to be visible
    page.wait_for_selector("input[type='password']", timeout=config.get('timeout', 30000))
    
    # Enter valid password
    page.fill("input[type='password']", config['password'])
    
    # Wait for the login button to be visible and enabled
    page.wait_for_selector("button[type='submit']", timeout=config.get('timeout', 30000))
    
    # Click login button
    page.click("button[type='submit']")
    
    # Wait for the dashboard/profile page to load
    page.wait_for_load_state('networkidle')
    
    # Assert successful login by checking for success indicator
    assert page.is_visible(".dashboard") or page.is_visible(".profile"), "User is not logged in successfully."

scenario.name: Invalid Login Test
scenario.description: Test failed login with incorrect password
scenario.expected_result: Error message should be shown for invalid credentials

invalid_login.error: Code validation failed: Syntax error in generated code: invalid syntax (<unknown>, line 1)
invalid_login.generated_code:
```python
def run_test(page, config):
    # Navigate to the login page
    page.goto(config['login_url'])

    # Wait for the page to load fully
    page.wait_for_load_state('networkidle')

    # Enter valid email address
    email_selector = "input[type='email'], input[name='email'], #email"
    page.wait_for_selector(email_selector, timeout=config['timeout'])
    page.fill(email_selector, config['email'])

    # Enter invalid password
    password_selector = "input[type='password'], input[name='password'], #password"
    page.wait_for_selector(password_selector, timeout=config['timeout'])
    page.fill(password_selector, 'InvalidPassword123!')

    # Click login button
    login_button_selector = "button[type='submit'], input[type='submit'], button:has-text('Login'), button:has-text('Sign In')"
    page.wait_for_selector(login_button_selector, timeout=config['timeout'])
    page.click(login_button_selector)

    # Wait for error message to be displayed
    error_message_selector = ".error, .alert-danger, [data-testid='error'], .error-message"
    page.wait_for_selector(error_message_selector, timeout=config['timeout'])

    # Assert that the error message is displayed
    error_message = page.inner_text(error_message_selector)
    assert error_message != "", "Error message should be shown for invalid credentials"
```
